overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing a player character holding a pistol while exploring a snowy rural village at night under aurora borealis skies. The player walks along frozen waterways and through wooden cabin settlements, eventually passing under a covered bridge with hanging lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: frozen riverbank surrounded by pine forest

agents.ego_description: walking along frozen riverbank holding pistol, approaching wooden structures on the right

entered.detail: frozen waterway with snow-covered ice surface
dense evergreen trees lining both sides of the river
large snow-dusted boulders along the riverbank
small wooden structure with canvas tarp roof and warm interior light

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a frozen river surrounded by dense pine forests under an aurora-lit sky. Rocky outcrops dot the snowy banks as a wooden shack with a tarp roof comes into view on the right, marking the edge of a small settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy village center with log cabins

events.description: moving from open riverbank into built-up village area with multiple wooden structures

agents.ego_description: proceeding through village past the tarp shack toward a large log cabin with smoking chimney

entered.detail: substantial wooden building with steep snow-covered roof and smoking chimney
dark-colored utility truck with headlights on, parked beside the cabin
stacked firewood covered in snow near the cabin

segments.scene_description: The player enters the village proper, passing the tarp-covered shack and approaching a large log cabin with smoke rising from its chimney. A parked military truck sits to the left with headlights illuminating the snow, while the aurora continues to cast a green glow overhead.

events.description: slight turn toward wooden bridge structure spanning the frozen water

agents.ego_description: continuing along snowy path between buildings, approaching wooden bridge with railings

entered.detail: elevated wooden walkway with snow-covered roof and support railings
small shed with open doorway showing interior light
modest wooden structure with snow-laden roof

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the settlement, the player passes between utility buildings and approaches a wooden bridge structure. The military truck remains visible to the left while the path leads toward the covered bridge spanning the frozen waterway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered area beneath wooden bridge with hanging lantern

events.description: entering dark semi-enclosed space underneath the wooden bridge
approaching warm light source from hanging lantern in the darkness

agents.ego_description: moving cautiously under the bridge and examining the detailed rope bindings and lantern

entered.detail: illuminated oil lantern suspended by thick rope bindings from wooden beams
thick log beams and planks forming the bridge underside structure
coiled nautical ropes wrapped around support posts securing the lantern

segments.scene_description: The player enters the dark, sheltered space beneath the wooden bridge, where the aurora light disappears. A warm hanging lantern illuminates the rough wooden beams and rope bindings overhead, creating a stark contrast with the cool exterior lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: village utility area with sheds and barrels

events.description: exiting covered bridge area back into open village with visible sky

agents.ego_description: emerging from under bridge and proceeding past utility sheds toward the main cabin

entered.detail: dark wooden shed with snow-covered sloped roof
rusted cylindrical barrel partially buried in snow
utility wires stretching between wooden poles above the path

segments.scene_description: Exiting the dark bridge underpass, the player returns to the aurora-lit village. A utility shed and metal barrel mark the transition area, while overhead power lines run between the wooden structures. The large log cabin with its smoking chimney becomes visible again in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered road flanked by forest and rocky cliffs

events.description: slight acceleration while approaching distant vehicle on the road

agents.ego_description: walking along snow-covered road with railings toward distant parked vehicles

entered.detail: wooden post railings lining both sides of the snow road
steep rock faces rising beside the road covered in snow
dark silhouette of parked truck visible down the road

segments.scene_description: The player proceeds along a snow-covered road flanked by wooden railings and rocky cliffs, leaving the main village behind. The forest closes in overhead, partially obscuring the aurora sky, as the player approaches a distant vehicle parked along the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a frozen wilderness into a sheltered village settlement and back out toward a secluded forest road under a shimmering aurora borealis. It begins along a frozen river flanked by dense pine forests and rocky outcrops, moving past a tarp-covered shack as the camera enters a village featuring a smoking log cabin and a military truck with glowing headlights. The path then leads deeper into the settlement and under a dark wooden bridge, where the cool green light of the aurora is momentarily replaced by the warm glow of a hanging lantern illuminating rough beams and rope. As the camera exits the underpass, it passes a utility shed and metal barrels before the landscape opens back up to the aurora-lit sky and the distant log cabin. Finally, the scene shifts away from the village center along a snow-covered road with wooden railings and rocky cliffs, as the forest canopy closes in to partially obscure the sky toward a distant parked vehicle.
